plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data Customize OpenAI py Local Debug

steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" popup within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Teams Agent with Data" dropdown option in the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" selection menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Type text: 'Customize' into the dropdown field labeled 'Select an option to load your data' within the Teams Agent with Data interface in Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Customize" option from the dropdown in the "Teams Agent with Data" interface, within Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit in Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selection of the default folder path (/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects) in the "Workspace Folder" dialog within Visual Studio Code.

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
#!/bin/bash

FILE_PATH="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_bd6Tn/src/app.py"

# Verify if the file exists
if [[ -f "$FILE_PATH" ]]; then
    # Replace the specific text in the file
    sed -i 's/model=config.OPENAI_MODEL_NAME/model=config.OPENAI_MODEL_NAME, azure_endpoint = ""/g' "$FILE_PATH"
    echo "Replacement completed successfully."
else
    echo "Error: File does not exist."
    exit 1
fi
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

=== STDOUT ===
